sourceRecords.title: User pasted Paris guide notes
sourceRecords.excerpt: User notes recommend a light arrival walk, Seine cruise, Louvre, Le Marais, Montmartre, and departure buffer.

sourceRecords.title: Louvre official website
sourceRecords.excerpt: Official website link kept for ticket and opening-hour confirmation before departure.
Xiaohongshu backend unavailable in this environment; use pasted note text or screenshots instead.

sourceRecords.excerpt: Hotel name, address, check-in and check-out dates captured. Sensitive booking details omitted.

sourceRecords.excerpt: Arrival flight timing captured. Passenger details and booking reference omitted.

sourceRecords.title: Train booking screenshot
sourceRecords.excerpt: Departure train timing captured. Passenger details and booking reference omitted.

lodging.name: Hotel Saint-Germain Example
lodging.notes: User note says luggage storage is available; confirm before arrival.

transport.notes: Keep arrival day light and reserve airport-to-city buffer.
Reserve station and security buffer before departure.

days.title: Arrival + Seine Evening
days.summary: Keep arrival day light, store luggage, then do a central walk and evening cruise.

stops.name: Hotel Saint-Germain Example
stops.description: Drop luggage before check-in if available.

stops.name: Tuileries Garden
stops.description: Light walk after arrival; good route into central Paris.

stops.name: Seine Cruise
stops.description: Evening cruise for river views and photos.
stops.deadline: Book or check same-day sailing time before leaving the hotel.
stops.fallback: If arrival is delayed, replace cruise with a shorter riverside walk.

days.title: Louvre + Le Marais
days.summary: Museum-first day with a lighter cafe and shopping afternoon.

stops.name: Louvre Museum
stops.description: Reserve 2-3 hours and book in advance.
stops.deadline: Check ticket entry time before departure.
stops.fallback: If tickets are unavailable, swap with Musee d'Orsay or exterior photos.

stops.name: Le Marais
stops.description: Cafe break, boutiques, and a relaxed afternoon walk.

days.title: Montmartre + Departure Buffer
days.summary: Short morning route, then keep enough station buffer for Eurostar.

stops.name: Sacre-Coeur
stops.description: Go in the morning for lighter crowds and city views.

stops.name: Montmartre
stops.description: Short neighborhood walk and lunch before collecting luggage.

stops.name: Paris Gare du Nord
stops.deadline: Reach the station by 16:20 at the latest for the 18:10 train.
stops.fallback: Skip Montmartre lunch if checkout or luggage pickup runs late.

warnings: Opening hours and transport schedules are not live-verified.
Confirm Louvre ticket availability before finalizing day 2.
Departure day is intentionally lighter to reduce train risk.
